data.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Apple, Tesla, Netflix, Oklo — And Dogecoin, Meme Coins Outpace Corporate Giants
data.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

data.title: 'Don't Normalize' Trump's Behavior, Warns Mark Cuban, Says It's An Insult To American Workers To Claim Their Job Could Be Done By A Child
Lucid CEO Peter Rawlinson Talks Saudi Investment, Elon Musk's Political Views And Taking Business From Tesla
data.description: Peter Rawlinson, CEO of Lucid Group, discussed the company's relationship with the Public Investment Fund (PIF) of Saudi Arabia, Lucid's rivalry with Tesla and Elon Musk's political views.

data.title: FBI Arrests Alabama Man Who Allegedly Hacked SEC's X Account To Prematurely Announce Bitcoin ETF Approval
data.description: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has arrested an Alabama resident for allegedly hacking the U.S.

data.title: Tesla Bull Gene Munster Breaks Down EV Giant's Robotaxi Plans And Future Of Autonomy, Says It Could Save 'Tens Of Thousands Of Lives And Hundreds Of Billions Of Hours Per Year'
data.description: Gene Munster shared insights from Tesla's "We, Robot" event, highlighting the long-term potential of autonomous vehicles while acknowledging delayed progress and the substantial impact a nationwide Robotaxi fleet could have on Tesla's future revenue.
